extra.reason: Built, committed (aa963b3), and verified live on :8787 after factory restart. /beads + /beads/<id> read-only routes shelling to bd --json; Live/Beads tab browser.

Implemented in 93ea6ef: round-boundary incremental rebase (_rebase_onto_integration in ticket.py) — clean git-mechanical rebase onto main each round, advancing base_ref; aborts on conflict and leaves the breaker to catch persistent drift.

Implemented in 93ea6ef: dispatcher staleness breaker — per-bead attempts+wall-time tracking; escalate to hard (excludes qwen) after 3 attempts, abandon (close) after 6 attempts or 8h. BeadsQueue.set_difficulty added. +10 unit tests.

Wrong granularity — passes worker pipeline but never integrates (3 merge-verify rejects, re-runs whole each time). Re-filing as per-concern socketHandlers slices (lobby/deck/trade/keyitem/run), chained so only one rewrites index.js at a time.

All 15 children delivered (ship hub, paid appearance booth, free hat-swap, 2D-menu removal, telepipe-hub integration) plus the dependent epoch (levels 250-276) and validation pass (277-289). Closing the epic wrapper; future beads can still reference autogame-24f by ID.
